transitions.name: carrier8_physics4_scan_left_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics4_scan_left_high with explicit return/debt tagging. Latch left-dominant scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics4_scan_left_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics4_scan_left_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Latch mid left scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics4_scan_right_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics4_scan_right_high with explicit return/debt tagging. Latch right-dominant scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics4_scan_right_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics4_scan_right_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Latch mid right scan only from an explicitly armed interior state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_join_left_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_join_left_high with explicit return/debt tagging. Materialize high severity from a latched left source.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_join_right_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_join_right_high with explicit return/debt tagging. Materialize high severity from a latched right source.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_join_left_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_join_left_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Materialize mid severity from a latched left source and advance the action phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_join_right_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_join_right_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Materialize mid severity from a latched right source and advance the action phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_contract_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_contract_high with explicit return/debt tagging. Interior contraction lowers high severity to mid.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics2_contract_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics2_contract_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Interior contraction lowers mid severity to zero and drops to the boundary.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics11_boundary_discharge
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics11_boundary_discharge with explicit return/debt tagging. Discharge latent action phase at the boundary before shell entry; this targets recurrent recovery without increasing action-rank jumps.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics5_boundary_to_shell
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics5_boundary_to_shell with explicit return/debt tagging. Enter the latent shell only from a discharged boundary state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_probe_left_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_probe_left_high with explicit return/debt tagging. Probe a left-high source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_probe_right_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_probe_right_high with explicit return/debt tagging. Probe a right-high source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_probe_left_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_probe_left_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Probe a left-mid source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_probe_right_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_probe_right_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Probe a right-mid source from cleared shell and stage a latched shell marker.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_stage_release_left
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_stage_release_left with explicit return/debt tagging. Release staged left shell marker into the normal latched-shell path.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics12_shell_stage_detour_left
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics12_shell_stage_detour_left with explicit return/debt tagging. Route staged left shell markers through a boundary detour before shell release to increase controllable path depth without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics12_shell_stage_detour_right
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics12_shell_stage_detour_right with explicit return/debt tagging. Route staged right shell markers through a boundary detour before shell release to increase controllable path depth without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics9_shell_stage_release_right
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics9_shell_stage_release_right with explicit return/debt tagging. Release staged right shell marker into the normal latched-shell path.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics10_shell_probe_neutral
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics10_shell_probe_neutral with explicit return/debt tagging. Probe neutral shell states before interior rearm by staging a shell marker; this widens shell recurrence while preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics6_shell_refresh_left
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics6_shell_refresh_left with explicit return/debt tagging. Refresh a left-latched shell state by clearing the latch before cleared rearm.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics6_shell_refresh_right
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics6_shell_refresh_right with explicit return/debt tagging. Refresh a right-latched shell state by clearing the latch before cleared rearm.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics5_shell_to_interior_cleared
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics5_shell_to_interior_cleared with explicit return/debt tagging. Re-arm the interior from a cleared shell state.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_left
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_left with explicit return/debt tagging. Re-arm the interior from a shell state that still carries a left scan latch.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_right
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics5_shell_to_interior_latched_right with explicit return/debt tagging. Re-arm the interior from a shell state that still carries a right scan latch.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics13_contract_mid_detour_nn
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics13_contract_mid_detour_nn with explicit return/debt tagging. Targeted detour for the max-chain branch: discharge mid-contraction into a neutral latch before shell routing to increase path depth without introducing action-rank increases.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics14_shell_high_rearm
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics14_shell_high_rearm with explicit return/debt tagging. Re-arm interior contraction for stalled high-severity shell states to recycle them into the controlled relaxation loop without increasing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics15_boundary_crossfeed_neutral
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics15_boundary_crossfeed_neutral with explicit return/debt tagging. Narrow boundary cross-feed detour on the max-chain bottleneck state; adds a depth step while preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics16_boundary_discharge_high
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics16_boundary_discharge_high with explicit return/debt tagging. Discharge high-severity boundary states into the shell-entry lane to reduce terminal mass while preserving action-rank monotonicity.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics17_boundary_handoff_left_to_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics17_boundary_handoff_left_to_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Narrow boundary handoff on the max-chain tail to open an extra acyclic segment without changing action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics18_boundary_discharge_mid
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics18_boundary_discharge_mid with explicit return/debt tagging. Discharge mid-severity boundary states into the shell-entry lane to further reduce terminal mass while preserving action-rank monotonicity.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics19_tail_handoff_n0_to_nn
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics19_tail_handoff_n0_to_nn with explicit return/debt tagging. Single-state tail handoff on the max-depth branch: insert one extra acyclic step before the existing contract-mid discharge, preserving action-rank phase.

transitions.name: carrier8_physics20_boundary_positive_discharge
transitions.description: 8-register lift of physics20_boundary_positive_discharge with explicit return/debt tagging. Discharge positive action phase at the boundary into the shell-entry lane. This widens deterministic recurrence from the physics18/19 baseline while preserving source conservation and the current locality budget.
